options.name: --input
options.description:
Required. Path to input file containing YAML or JSON API
specification.

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
Base name of namespace in which generated code should be
placed.

options.name: --dir
options.description:
This parameter indicates that input is not file but
directory.

options.name: --excludeTests
options.description:
(Default: false) This parameter indicates that client
Specflow tests should be generated.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Path to the output directory in which generated code
should be placed.
